results.title: Baxter Health earns Arkansa's first Level 1 geriatric emergency department accreditation
results.description: Baxter Health's Cline Emergency Center in Mtn. Home, Ark., has achieved Level 1 Geriatric Emergency Department Accreditation from the American College of Emergency Physicians. The designation makes Baxter Health the first and only emergency department in Arkansas to earn a Level 1 accreditation, officials announced on Monday.

results.title: Decatur council resists stricter data center limits
results.description: The Decatur City Council on Monday rejected an effort to restore stricter proposed zoning regulations for data centers after reaching a consensus to remove those restrictions during last week's work session.

results.title: Morgan delegation highlights data centers, budgets and local projects
results.description: State Rep. Parker Moore on Tuesday defended the development of data centers in Alabama as a national security necessity, arguing that public opposition has been influenced by foreign disinformation and confusion between data centers and bitcoin-mining facilities.

results.title: Russia’s war casualty toll in Ukraine up by 1,330 over past day
results.description: Russia has lost an estimated 1,433,230 troops in its full-scale war against Ukraine since February 24, 2022, including 1,330 killed or wounded over the past 24 hours.
